title: Miconia erostrata
taxonomy: Miconia erostrata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This family is commonly known as the melastome family or loganias. The genus Miconia is a large group of plants, with over 1,000 species, and is widely distributed across the tropical regions of the world. Miconia erostrata is native to Central and South America, particularly in countries such as Costa Rica and Ecuador. It is a part of the Melastomataceae family, which is a group of flowering plants known for their brightly colored flowers and often hairy stems.
